SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-25-13 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 505

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sabrina Adler, Plaintiff/Respondent In Pro Per
Nancy Montgomery, Plaintiff/Respondent In Pro Per
Cathy Deng, Principal Defendant/Appellant
Phillip Stone, SBN 6499, Counsel for Defendant/Appellant

The cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Each side presents an opening statement of the case.

SABRINA ADLER, NANCY MONTGOMERY testify on behalf of plaintiffs.

The following exhibits are introduced:
1 - Seven photographs collectively
2 - Home Depot Brohure about Quartz Countertops
3 - Outstanding Kitchen and Bath Invoice #787 (1-page)
4 - three pages collectively of multiple emails
5 - Document re Products Advantages
6 - three pieces of marble/granite-like stone countertop material

WADE L. GUNDERSON, AILAN (CATHY) DENG testify for the defendants.

The following exhibits are introduced:
A - Outstanding Kitchen and Bath Invoice #601 (1-page)

The matter is taken under submission

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Judgment Entered
